ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AGRO PHOS INDIA LIMITED announced the appointment of Mrs. Sakina Dharwala as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director, effective July 11, 2026, pending shareholder approval. This appointment leads to the reconstitution of the Audit, Stakeholders Relationship, and Nomination and Remuneration Committees, thereby strengthening the company's corporate governance framework with a qualified professional. No material red flags are identified, as this appears to be a standard governance enhancement.
